worst_signals_1d_recent.diagnosis: BUY-biased: 166B/38S. BUY catastrophically wrong, SELL excellent.
Stuck 100% BUY mode (647B/0S). No SELL signals in 7d.
BUY collapsed to 15.8%. SELL decent at 56.6%.

systemic_pattern.name: BUY_ACCURACY_COLLAPSE
systemic_pattern.description: Nearly ALL signals show collapsed BUY accuracy while SELL accuracy remains strong. Bearish regime signature. Equal BUY/SELL weighting masks that SELL signals profit and BUY signals destroy.

correlation_clusters.note: All 6 vote SELL together with >60% SELL accuracy. Highly correlated.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Keep drift_regime_gate and amihud. Disable other 4.

correlation_clusters.note: Strong BUY bias. In bearish market, dilute SELL consensus with wrong BUY votes.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Directional accuracy gate: suppress BUY votes when signal BUY accuracy < 40%.

recommendations.title: Directional accuracy gate (BUY/SELL split)
recommendations.description: Gate on recent BUY accuracy when signal says BUY, SELL accuracy when it says SELL. Suppresses catastrophic 15-33% BUY calls while preserving useful 56-87% SELL calls.

recommendations.title: Disable 4 redundant regime signals
recommendations.description: adx_regime_switch (49%), bocpd (51.1%), vol_ratio (48.8%), choppiness (51.7%) are correlated near-coinflip. Keep drift (58.9%) and amihud (58.6%).

recommendations.title: Force-HOLD econ_calendar and crypto_macro
recommendations.description: econ_calendar stuck 100% BUY. crypto_macro 81% BUY at 14.5% accuracy. Force-HOLD both.

recommendations.title: Recalibrate LLM confidence
recommendations.description: LLMs report 99.9% confidence but achieve 45% on crypto. Calibration layer needed.
